titleStmt.title: SII 17.680: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 680. (A.R. No. 624 of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdanārā yaṇasvāmin temple.
The details of date given in this inscription, viz., Śaka 1442, Vikrama, Kaṉṉi śu 5, Sunday, Aniḻam, correspond to 1520 A.D., September 16, Sunday, f.d.t. ·24; f.d.n. ·21.

It records the gift of 1000 paṇam in gold and lands in different places for the construction of a maṇḍapa in front of the Kariyamāṇikkapperumāḷ temple in Harivāsapuṇyakshētram and for the provision of food and other offerings to the god when he comes and stays there on festival days, by the nāṭṭavar of Puḻaṟkōṭṭam, Puliyūrkōṭṭam, Īkkāṭṭu-kkōṭṭam, Maṇavūr-kōṭṭam, [Kuṉṟava]ttana-kōṭṭam, in Vēdagiridēśam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam alias Toṇḍa-maṇḍalam. The gift was made over to Deyvaṅgaḷ Perumāḷ Mudaliyār, son of Aṉaittaḻaguṅ-kaṇḍa Haridāsar Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyār, the tānattār of Harivāsapuram, on the banks of Āraṇi in Kuṉṟavattanakkōṭṭam.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇṭaleśvara rājadhirājarājaparameśvara śrīvira pratāpa kṛṣṇayadevamahārāyaṟ pṛthivi
rājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa śakābdaM 1000 4 100 4 10 2 ṉ meṟ cellā niṉṟa vikrama samvatsarattu kaṉṉi
nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum Āditya vāramum peṟṟa Aniḻattuṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalamāna
toṇṭar maṇṭalattu vedagiri deśattu kuṉṟavattanak koṭṭattu Āraṇi tīrattu vedo padeśa puṇyakṣetramākiya
harivāsapurattu stānattār Aṉaittaḻakuṅ kaṇṭa haridāsar tiruveṅkaṭa muṭaiyār putrar teyvaṅkaḷ
perumāḷ mutaliyārkku Immaṇṭalattu Inta deśattu puḻaṟ koṭṭam puliyūr koṭṭam yik kāṭṭuk koṭṭam
maṇavūrk koṭṭam kuṉṟavattanak koṭṭam paiyyūrk koṭṭam mutalāna ṉāṭṭavarom ṉāṭṭupayamaṇṭapattukku
dharmmaśaāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi harivarasa puṇyakṣatrattile kariyamāṇikkap perumāḷ sannidhiyile nāṭṭukkāka
tirumaṇṭapamum Anta maṇṭapattile nāṭṭupayamākapperumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Amutu cey taruḷattakkatākavum Oru suta
mtram paṇṇittara veṇumeṉṟu nāṅkaḷ nāṭṭavarāka vantu taṅkaḷaik keṭkaiyil tāṅkaḷ taṅkaḷ kaiyyile
paṇamāyiram poṉ koṇṭu teṉmaṇṭapamum kaṭṭuvittu Upayasutaṅtramum paṇṇit yil Inta Upayam naṭatti
varumpaṭikku ṉāṅkaḷ Aṉaittuk koṭṭattu ṉāṭṭavarum vantu Eṅkaḷeṅkaḷ koṭṭattiluṇṭāṉa kiṟā
mamellān terappaṭṭuk koṭṭantoṟum ṉāṭutoṟum paṟṟukkaḷ toṟum ṉāṅkaḷ viṭṭa ṉila māṉṉi
yattukku viparam puḻaṟ koṭṭam Eḻumurṉāṭu Ākuṭiṉāṭu kāṉappeṟuṉāṭu veṇkalṉāṭu Amapat tūr ṉā
ṭuḷpaṭak kiṟāmam ṉūṟṟirupatukku @ 10 8 1000 3 100 puliyūrk koṭṭam kulottuṅka coḻavaḷaṉāṭu kiṟāmaṉ ṉūṟṟaṟu
patukku @ 10 10003 100 Īkkāṭṭuk koṭṭam teṉtuṇṭam kiṟāmam Aṟupatukku @ 1000 9 100 2 10 vaṭatuṇṭam kaccūr
ṉāṭu kiṟāmam muppattiraṇṭukku @ 3 1000 5 100 maṇavūrk koṭṭam @ 6 1000 1 paiyūrk koṭṭam kiṟāmam ṉāṟ
pattañcukku @ 4 1000 100 Illattūrṉāṭu māṅkaḷurṉāṭu poḷiyūrṉāṭu taṇikaiṉāṭu Āka ṉāṭu ṉālukku
kiṟāmam Eḻupattiraṇṭukku @ 3 1000 3 10 5 Irāmatakukāvaṟceri mutalāṉa malaippaṟṟuṉāṭu kiṟāmam Irupa
tteṭṭukku @ 9 100 9 10 niṉṟaiyūrṉāṭu kiṟāmam ṉāṟpattiraṇṭukku @ 5 1000 3 100 9 10 Añcūr ṉāṭu kiṟāmam patiṉeḻu
kku @ 100 coṉāṭu kiṟāmam muppatukku @ 7 100 8 10 Āka yinta nilaṅkaḷellām tāṅkaḷ paramparaiyākac can
tiṟātittiya varaiyum Aṉupavittukkoṇṭu perumāḷ ṉāṭṭu maṇṭapattile tiruttotatiruṉāḷ toṟum Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu
Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭikkuk kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu ṉāṭṭu maṇṭapattile perumāḷeḻuntaruḷukuṟa kaṭṭaḷaikku veṇṭiṉa maṇ
ṭapac coṭippu ṉaivvettiyakkaṭṭaḷai Aṭaikkāyamutu cantaṉakkāpput tirumālai tirupparivaṭṭam koyiṟtāṉa veccam
paricārakaveccam koyiṟkottu veccam maṟṟumuṇṭāṉa Aṅkaraṅkavaipokaṅkaḷellām cantiṟātittiya varaiyum tā
ṅkaḷe naṭattak kaṭaivarkaḷākavum ṉāṅkaḷeḻutittanta terippiṉpaṭi kṣetramāṉṉiyattile I
nta vūrār nilam viṭṭo meṉṟālum Inta marapile Oru Apakirtti vantāl Akṣaprā ṇaṉai ve ḷaccū
kaya nirvvakiccuk koḷḷuvom Appaṭiye ṉāṅkaḷ ṉāṭākak kūṭi nirvvakiccut tarakkaṭai vomākavum Ip
paṭikku ṉāṭṭu maṇṭapa Upaiya tharmmaśāsanam paṇṇik kuṭuttom Aṉaittaḻakuṅ kaṇṭa haridāsar
teyvaṅkaḷ perumāḷ mutaliyārukku Aṉaittuk koṭṭattum Aṉaittu ṉāṭṭiṉum Uṇṭā kiya ṉāṭṭavarom

Inta dharmmattukku yātoruvaṉ Ahitam paṇṇukiṟāṉ Avaṉ gaṅgaikkaraiyile
kārām pacuvaiyum mātā pitākkaḷaiyum buddhi pūrvvakamākak koṉṟa doṣattile pokakkaṭaivaṉākavum Inta dharmmattai pari
pālanam paṇṇiṉaper Ihalokattile Iṣṭamanoratha siddhiyai yellām Anubhavittup paralokattilum Irupattoru
talaimuṟai pitṛvarggattuṭane Artta patattile Iruppārkaḷ śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 17.680 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
